case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. RANNYEL LEITE CHAVES CABRAL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED SEP-10-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVES CABRAL, RANNYEL LEITE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAVES CABRAL, RANNYEL LEITE $2,238.33 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,338.33 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,238.33 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVES CABRAL, RANNYEL LEITE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARICURZ CEDANO LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT RANNYEL LEITE CHAVES CABRAL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.
